directive.title: Neon DB schema setup with Drizzle ORM foundation

auditor.summary: The build establishes a solid foundation with Drizzle ORM schema, connection management, and TypeScript types. However, it fails to deliver two critical files (seed.ts and migration SQL), has a pool configuration mismatch with acceptance criteria (20 vs 50 connections), lacks audit log immutability enforcement, and is missing the queries layer entirely. The build is recoverable with moderate effort but cannot pass in its current state due to missing required files and architectural gaps.

top_issues.description: Required seed file was not generated despite being in files_to_create. Seed data is essential for development and testing.
Required migration SQL file was not generated. Migration system cannot function without initial schema definition.
Connection pool max is set to 20 but acceptance criteria requires handling 50 concurrent requests. Pool may exhaust under load.
